query:
SELECT 
  column_name,
  data_type,
  is_nullable
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_name = 'games'
  AND column_name IN ('underOdds', 'totalEdge', 'totalDiff', 'spreadEdge')
ORDER BY column_name
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute 
SELECT 
  column_name,
  data_type,
  is_nullable
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_name = 'games'
  AND column_name IN ('underOdds', 'totalEdge', 'totalDiff', 'spreadEdge')
ORDER BY column_name
